channel.title: GitHub Fluent Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Fluent in GitHub

item.title: janeczku/calibre-web
item.description: 📚 Web app for browsing, reading and downloading eBooks stored in a Calibre database

item.title: an-anime-team/the-honkers-railway-launcher
item.description: The Honkers Railway launcher for Linux with automatic patching and telemetry disabling

item.title: stephanrauh/ngx-extended-pdf-viewer
item.description: A full-blown PDF viewer for Angular 16, 17, and beyond
